entries.reason: Routine and undone in a keystroke: a green door
Read-only evaluation work: nothing to undo
Settings changes persist beyond the conversation that made them: a person opens this door
Scheduled jobs outlive the chat that created them: persistence earns the yellow door
Burns the receipts. Checking must stay possible, so this stays locked no matter who asks
Widens every door at once. Locked, and the permanence is the feature
